creator: nsayer@quack.kfu.com
text:
Enclosed is a patched version of the si driver. It now supports
the PCI and soon-to-come Jet PCI host cards.

It is conceivable that one could have a unit number collision
between the PCI and ISA 'incarnations' of this driver. It is
therefore recommended that extreme caution be used when both
ISA and PCI host cards are present in a system (which it could
be argued is a rather silly thing to do).

Fix: untar this into /sys/, then apply the patch (it simply adds an entry
to /sys/i386/conf/files.i386 for the new jet download code).
